title: Memory MCP Backend Conformance Report
description: Aggregates SV-MEM-01..08 + HR-17 conformance results across multiple Memory MCP backend implementations. Emitted by soa-validate after running --memory-backend=<name> against each backend in turn. Consumed by release-gate scripts per §8.7.5 to determine v1.0.x ship readiness (M5 addition, L-56).

report_version.description: Report schema version. Increments on breaking schema changes.

spec_commit.description: soa-harness-specification git commit SHA against which tests ran. Matches soa-validate.lock MANIFEST pin.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp. Byte-identity across re-runs excludes this field.

host_framework.description: Underlying storage layer identifier. 'custom' for adopter-authored backends not in the reference set.

endpoint_url.description: OPTIONAL. The URL the validator drove tests against during this report run.

cells.description: One cell per SV-MEM-0N + HR-17 test. Minimum 9 cells (SV-MEM-01..08 + HR-17). Additional cells permitted for future Memory-related test IDs.

test_id.description: Test identifier matching the must-map tests key.

status.description: Terminal outcome of the test against this backend. 'waived' requires waiver_reference.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock test runtime in milliseconds. OPTIONAL but strongly recommended for performance tracking across releases.

error_message.description: REQUIRED when status is fail or error. Truncated to 4096 chars. Contains the validator-emitted diagnostic including expected vs observed.

waiver_reference.description: REQUIRED when status is waived. Points to an L-entry (e.g., 'L-57' in IMPLEMENTATION_LESSONS.md) that documents why this backend doesn't pass this test and what the remediation commitment is (typically 'deferred to v1.0.x').

all_green.description: True iff every cell across every backend has status in {pass, waived}. Release-gate scripts fail if this is false for a final release.

backends_tested.description: Count of backends represented in the backends[] array.

tests_per_backend.description: Count of cells per backend. All backends MUST have the same cell count (same test set).

failing_count.description: Total cells with status in {fail, error}. Waived cells do not count toward this.

waiver_count.description: Total cells with status 'waived'. Each must have a valid waiver_reference.
